/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/clipdeck_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/clipdeck_tests.dir/src/tests/keybind_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_tests.dir/src/tests/encoded_ring_buffer_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_tests.dir/src/tests/number_parser_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_tests.dir/src/tests/settings_store_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_tests.dir/src/tests/string_utils_test.cpp.o -o clipdeck_tests  libclipdeck_core.a lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib64/libgstapp-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstpbutils-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstvideo-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstaudio-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstbase-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstreamer-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libglib-2.0.so lib/libgtest.a
